title: C&S & Architectural Coordinator
description:
Job Summary:


We are seeking an experienced C&S & Architectural Coordinator to join our team. The successful candidate will be responsible for coordinating and managing the civil, structural (C&S), and architectural aspects of the project, ensuring timely and successful completion.


Key Responsibilities:


1. Coordinate with C&S and architectural consultants, contractors, and suppliers to ensure compliance with project specifications and requirements.

2. Review and comment on C&S and architectural shop drawings, method statements, and material submissions.

3. Conduct site inspections to monitor C&S and architectural installation works and ensure compliance with project requirements.

4. Identify and resolve C&S and architectural-related issues and defects.

5. Coordinate with other project teams (e.g., M&E, landscape) to ensure integration and compatibility of C&S and architectural systems.

6. Develop and maintain C&S and architectural-related project documentation, including records of inspections, testing, and commissioning.

7. Ensure compliance with relevant building codes, regulations, and industry standards.

8. Collaborate with the project team to develop and implement project schedules, budgets, and resource allocation plans.

9. Provide technical support and guidance to site staff and contractors.


Specific C&S Responsibilities:


1. Coordinate with structural engineers to ensure compliance with structural design and specifications.

2. Monitor and report on structural construction progress, including foundation, superstructure, and finishes.

3. Ensure compliance with relevant structural codes and regulations.


Specific Architectural Responsibilities:


1. Coordinate with architects to ensure compliance with architectural design and specifications.

2. Monitor and report on architectural construction progress, including finishes, fixtures, and equipment.

3. Ensure compliance with relevant architectural codes and regulations.


Requirements:


1. Higher Nitec / Diploma in Civil Engineering, Architecture, or related field.

2. Fresh / experience in C&S and architectural coordination or related field, preferably in construction or building development.

3. Excellent communication, coordination, and problem-solving skills.

4. Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

5. Proficient in MS Office / BMIB & CAD will be added advantage

6. Fresh candidate will be guided along the way

A small and progressive company set up in 2019 which established the core foundation of professionlism, integrity and teamwork. We uphold and aspires to achieve continuous growth through competitive pricing, excellence in quality as well as value added services.


We invest heavily in human resource and staff training to equip staff effectively for their roles and responsibilties, thus embark on expansion for the future.
